title: astragalus subacaulis
intro: Astragalus subacaulis, also known as low-growing milkvetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects, which may help to enhance the body's natural response to infection and stress. The health benefits of Astragalus subacaulis are believed to include improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and increased endurance, making it a popular herb among athletes and individuals with chronic illnesses. Astragalus subacaulis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract for use in herbal remedies, with the most common preparation methods involving decoction or infusion.
